title: Body found in Friemersheim outside Great Brak, two suspects arrested
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Breaking News","html":"Breaking News"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"FRIEMERSHEIM NEWS - Great Brak River police are investigating a case of murder following the discovery of a man’s body by police officers in Friemersheim today, 2 September.","html":"FRIEMERSHEIM NEWS - Great Brak River police are investigating a case of murder following the discovery of a man’s body by police officers in Friemersheim today, 2 September."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"According to Great Brak River Police Spokesperson, Sergeant Lauriane Botha, the deceased (62) was reported as missing on Saturday 30 August."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Following the discovery of the deceased, two suspects, aged 27 and 37, were arrested by Great Brak River detectives today.","html":"Following the discovery of the deceased, two suspects, aged 27 and 37, were arrested by Great Brak River detectives today."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The victim’s body was reportedly hidden behind bushes, several meters away from the home one of the suspects.","html":"The victim’s body was reportedly hidden behind bushes, several meters away from the home one of the suspects."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The circumstances surrounding the incident are not yet known. Botha says the victim was found with a wound to his head.","html":"The circumstances surrounding the incident are not yet known. Botha says the victim was found with a wound to his head."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Body found in Friemersheim outside Great Brak, two suspects arrested
